role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text but failed to provide candidates.

landscape: claimed 'calcareous/light-colored soil visible' — soil is not clearly visible under vegetation
botanics: claimed 'Opuntia (prickly pear cacti) in the mid-ground' — not clearly visible

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Vegetation and terrain description matches image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Vegetation description matches image, though specific cactus ID is weak.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline failed to localize the image correctly (predicting Mexico instead of Colombia). The linguistic agent provided no candidates, and the judge failed to trigger a region consensus or hypothesis generation, resulting in a default prediction based on the strongest (but incorrect) landscape/botanical signals.
verdict.region_narrowing_notes: The judge failed to perform any region narrowing. It did not identify a consensus (which didn't exist) nor did it generate hypotheses to resolve the conflict between North/Central American signals and the actual South American location.
verdict.hypothesis_pool_notes: No hypothesis pool was generated. The final prediction was a single country guess without a structured evaluation of alternatives.
